title: Wild Whiskers
description: A Minecraft Mod That Adds the Wonderful Animal, the Red Panda!!!
body: This mod adds a new mob called the "Red Panda" which spawns in jungle biomes and will pick up bamboo, sugar cane, and sugar. It is tamable be right clicking on it with the previous items and can be picked up once tamed. (Idk if it spawns naturally yet)
